title: Denshattack! receives critical acclaim as one of the best games of 2026
summary: The homage to Dreamcast with anime aesthetics and trains is praised for its originality, frenetic pace, and nostalgia.

title: Glen Schofield, creator of Dead Space, announces his retirement from the industry
summary: The veteran developer, who worked on Call of Duty and founded Striking Distance Studios, bids farewell with an emotional message.

title: FromSoftware confirms closed network test for The Duskbloods on Switch 2
summary: Players will be able to try the Nintendo exclusive at the end of August, although access will be limited and in high demand.

title: Sony announces PlayStation Plus Extra and Premium games for July 2026
summary: The new monthly catalog includes major open-world titles and PS2 classics for subscribers.

title: GameStop partners with Uber Eats and GOG promotes homemade physical media as discs face extinction
summary: The industry debates the future of the physical format with new distribution, sales, and digital preservation strategies.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced triumphs on Steam despite controversy over removed content
summary: The remake achieves the best launch of the saga on the platform, although players criticize the absence of classic mechanics and day-one DLC.

title: Blizzard ends updates for Overwatch's Stadium mode due to low viewership
summary: The MOBA-inspired mode, launched just a year ago, goes into maintenance mode after a significant drop in players.

title: Steve Buscemi joins the cast of the Far Cry television series
summary: The acclaimed film and television actor joins the adaptation of Ubisoft's popular video game.

title: Ubisoft Barcelona workers join strike against layoffs in Assassin's Creed
summary: The studio mobilizes while the company admits concern over the impact of constant staff cuts.

title: Survey reveals that 100% of Japanese online developers use artificial intelligence
summary: The use of AI focuses on market analysis and behavior prediction, although it generates intense debate about copyright.

title: Former Rockstar producer justifies the absence of GTA 6 on PC at launch
summary: The developer states that starting with console limitations allows for better optimization of the game's development.

title: The Batman 2 delays its theatrical release until February 2028
summary: The highly anticipated sequel directed by Matt Reeves suffers a new and significant delay in its release schedule.

title: Matt Damon as Odysseus arrives in Fortnite to promote Nolan's new film
summary: The promotional collaboration brings together Christopher Nolan's anticipated film 'The Odyssey' and the popular battle royale game.

title: Roblox copies of Meccha Chameleon surpass the original Steam game in players
summary: The phenomenon of clones and AI on the creation platform challenges the successful indie chameleon title.

title: Battlefield 6 will bring back classic features and prepares a crossover with Top Gun
summary: The new title in the war saga promises to return to the roots of the franchise while planning thematic content inspired by the film.

title: Monster Hunter Wilds gets a permanent price cut ahead of expansion launch
summary: Capcom reduces the game's price to boost sales ahead of the anticipated Ascendance DLC.

title: One Piece card speculation causes Weekly Shonen Jump magazine to sell out in Japan
summary: Card resellers cause an unprecedented shortage of the popular manga publication across the country.

title: Developer accused of sexual harassment confirms involvement in the new Avatar game
summary: Controversy surrounds the launch of the fighting game based on Avatar: The Last Airbender, scheduled for next week.

title: Ratchet & Clank: Ranger Rumble opens pre-registration for mobile devices
summary: The new title in the popular action-platformer saga from Insomniac Games will soon arrive on smartphones.

title: Dear Passengers: the chaotic flight management simulator aims to be the new viral phenomenon
summary: The promising indie game about airline disasters and demanding passengers captures the attention of the gaming community.
